query: SELECT t.id, t.stationId, t.name, t.pricePerKwh, cs.name as station_name FROM tariffs t LEFT JOIN charging_stations cs ON t.stationId = cs.id WHERE t.isActive = 1 ORDER BY t.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kTaiYRMPpnS3sR.17f9e41a6e58 --database UcUrociZeo4QVAHHN9vAuZ --execute SELECT t.id, t.stationId, t.name, t.pricePerKwh, cs.name as station_name FROM tariffs t LEFT JOIN charging_stations cs ON t.stationId = cs.id WHERE t.isActive = 1 ORDER BY t.id
